descriptors: I possess the strength and agility of a wolf. I hide my face with a rudimentary wooden mask that I made with my own hands. I wear a threadbare red cape, the last gift of my mother.
data.agenda: To unleash her animalistic fury on Elizaveta and anyone who defends her. Taking revenge on my mother has become an obsession for me.
gifts: Wolf's Blood: Iskra is moved by animalistic fury that allows her to act twice in the course of an exchange.
The Senses of a Wolf: Iskra's sense of smell has become infallible. The little girl will always be able to identify someone if she knows their scent, ignoring all kinds of disguise and even magic.
